restaurants.name: Raintree Restaurant
highlights: On the Mysore→Madikeri route; excellent local food
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

restaurants.name: Coorg Cuisine
highlights: Classic spot to experience authentic Coorg flavours
Best stop for traditional flavours after the morning hill circuit
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

restaurants.name: Beans N Brews Café
highlights: Ideal for guests who prefer something light after travel
Light lunch for guests wanting a quick, casual break

attractions.name: Tibetan Golden Temple (Namdroling Monastery)
attractions.description: A serene Buddhist monastery known for its golden Buddha statues, vibrant murals, peaceful chants, and Tibetan-style architecture.
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Coorg, Kabini, Mysore - Sandhya.pdf

attractions.name: Kaveri Nisargadhama
attractions.description: A tranquil forest island accessible via a hanging bridge. Spot deer, stroll among bamboo groves, and enjoy views of the Kaveri River.
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Mandalpatti Viewpoint
attractions.description: One of Coorg's most breathtaking sunrise points with rolling mist and 360° hill views
attractions.hours: Best time: Arrive by ~5:00 AM for sunrise
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Coorg, Kabini, Mysore - Sandhya.pdf

attractions.name: Tala Kaveri
attractions.description: A serene spiritual site believed to be the origin of the River Kaveri. Climb up the steps behind the temple for panoramic mountain views.
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Coorg, Kabini, Mysore - Sandhya.pdf

attractions.name: Bhagamandala Temple Complex
attractions.description: Located at the Triveni Sangam — confluence of three rivers. A peaceful temple stop rich in Dravidian architecture.
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Coorg, Kabini, Mysore - Sandhya.pdf

attractions.name: Dubare Elephant Camp
attractions.description: Interact with elephants, learn about conservation efforts, and participate in feeding or bathing (availability varies)
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Coorg, Kabini, Mysore - Sandhya.pdf

attractions.name: Abbey Falls
attractions.description: A short forest walk leads to this powerful waterfall surrounded by spices and coffee plantations — great for photos.
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Coorg, Kabini, Mysore - Sandhya.pdf

attractions.name: Nisargadhama (Kaveri Nisargadhama Forest Park)
attractions.description: Bamboo groves, deer park, and riverside walkways – perfect for a scenic pitstop
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Coorg, Kabini, Mysore - Sandhya.pdf

attractions.name: Raja's Seat
attractions.description: Sunset garden with panoramic valley views
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Coorg, Kabini, Mysore - Sandhya.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Removing footwear before entering temples/homes is customary

safety_tips.tip: Avoid loud conversation inside temples or wildlife parks

safety_tips.tip: Ask permission before photographing local people
